title: AI Network Health Checker
description: Parses router outputs such as show bgp summary, show processes cpu, and interface status to detect BGP issues, high CPU, CRC errors, and down interfaces.
outcome: Built a mini NOC-style automation workflow for health reporting.
details:
This project analyzes router CLI outputs to detect key network health issues.

Features:
- Detects BGP neighbors in Active state
- Identifies high CPU utilization
- Finds CRC errors on interfaces
- Detects interface down events

Approach:
- Uses Python string parsing (split, strip)
- Iterates through CLI output line by line
- Tracks interface context for accurate error mapping
- Generates a summary report for NOC operations

Output:
- Network Health Report
- Issue Summary (BGP, CRC, Interface, CPU)
- Overall Status: HEALTHY / UNHEALTHY

title: BGP Anomaly Detector
description: Parses BGP summary output, stores snapshots, and detects anomalies such as neighbor state changes, prefix drops, and new or missing peers.
outcome: Built a mini monitoring system that simulates real NOC behavior by detecting BGP issues automatically using snapshot comparison.
details:
This project analyzes BGP CLI outputs and compares network states over time to identify anomalies.

Features:
- Detects BGP neighbor state changes (Established → Idle/Active)
- Identifies prefix drops or sudden increase
- Detects new or missing BGP peers
- Supports snapshot-based comparison for continuous monitoring

Approach:
- Parses CLI output using Python (split, strip, regex)
- Converts parsed data into structured dictionary
- Saves snapshots in JSON format
- Compares current snapshot with previous snapshot
- Generates alerts based on detected anomalies

Output:
- Parsed BGP Data (structured)
- Snapshot JSON files
- Anomaly Alerts (BGP Down, Prefix Drop, Peer Change)
- Overall Status: STABLE / UNSTABLE
